The '''''Firestorm''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that was part of the [[Lumiya's fleet|fleet]] of [[Lumiya]] shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. It was modified to carry 4 [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]].<ref name="Lumiya: Dark Star of the Empire" />

{{Ship-stub}}
